reasoning: Based on multiple credible reports from October 2025 (including Bloomberg, TechRadar, and Mashable), Apple officially announced an upgraded version of the Apple Vision Pro featuring the new M5 chip on October 15, 2025. This device features several updates over the original M2 model, including higher refresh rate displays (120Hz) and faster AI performance. Pre-orders began immediately, and the device officially launched and became available for purchase in store on October 22, 2025. This clearly satisfies the criteria of being an 'Apple Vision' product that acts as a successor to the original iteration. Furthermore, since the launch date was October 22, 2025, it was released to the general public well before the December 31, 2025 deadline.
